revision.text:

}}
'''Amaoshio no Mikoto''' (天忍男命, birth and death dates unknown) was a figure from ancient {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}.
== Genealogy ==
According to the {{ill|Kujiki|en|Kujiki|qid=Q2716751|lt=Sendai Kuji Hongi|1=Kujiki}}, "Tenson Hongi" section, Amaoshio no Mikoto is described as the child of {{ill|Amenokumunushi no Mikoto|ja|天村雲命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amenokumunushi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天押雲根命|1=Ame-no-Oshikumone|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q91088537}}. His mother is identified as {{ill|Ahiraiohime|ja|阿俾良依姫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ahiraiohime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
His wife was {{ill|Kanaranohime|ja|賀奈良知姫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanaranohime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Tsuruginemikoto|ja|剣根命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuruginemikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a chieftain of the {{ill|Katsuragi no Kuni no Miyatsuko|lt=Katsuragi no Kuni no Miyatsuko|lt=Katsuragi Kuni|ja|葛城国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsuragi Kuni|qq=}}. Their children included {{ill|Okitsu Yoso|ja|瀛津世襲命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okitsu Yoso|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yosotarashi-hime|en|Yosotarashi-hime|qid=Q10869205|lt=Yosotarashi-hime|1=Yosotarashi-hime}}—consort of {{ill|Emperor Kōshō|en|Emperor Kōshō|qid=Q312841|lt=Emperor Kōshō|1=Emperor Kōshō}}—and {{ill|Tategaaka no Mikoto|ja|建額赤命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tategaaka no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the ancestor of the {{ill|Tsumori clan|ja|津守氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsumori clan|qq=}}.
The {{ill|Shinsen Shōjiroku|en|Shinsen Shōjiroku|qid=Q1045362|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku|1=Shinsen Shōjiroku}} lists him as a third-generation descendant of {{ill|Amenohoakari|ja|火明命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amenohoakari|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天火明命}}.<ref>"Left Kyō, Divine Lineage: Descendants of Amaterasu, Tsubohisa." Shinsen Shōjiroku, Kōnin 6 (815).</ref>
